zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Halsbury於大約1232年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Peter de Halsbury28歲，母親Elizabeth of Halsbury25歲。她於1259年與Bartholomew Giffard在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1287年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Halsbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Malmesbury in Wiltshire. The placename derives from the Old Irish personal name Maildub + Old English burg ‘fortress’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Halsbury was born about 1232, in Devon, England, her father, Peter de Halsbury, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth of Halsbury, was 25. She married Bartholomew Giffard in 1259, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1287, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

Elle a épousé Bartholomew Giffard en 1259, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1287, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Halsbury è nata il circa 1232 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Peter de Halsbury, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth of Halsbury, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Bartholomew Giffard nel 1259, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1287, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Halsbury(이)가 대략 1232년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de Halsbury(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth of Halsbury(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1259년 영국 데폰에서 Bartholomew Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Yester Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: иестир кастл, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Halsbury родилась около 1232 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter de Halsbury было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Halsbury, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bartholomew Giffard в 1259 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1287 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
